name: White Chocolate Truffles
recipeIngredient: 8 oz White chocolate (do not use compound coating)
6 tbsp Unsalted butter at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Set aside a wax paper-lined baking sheet.
3. Chop the white chocolate into small pieces and set aside.
4. Toast the nuts on a baking sheet in a single layer for 5 to 8 minutes.
5. Set the toasted nuts aside until ready to use.
